I want to get a car. I want a laptop. Insane setup. I want freedom. I want to prove to myself that all work and path taken so far was the right and correct decision.
I want to succeed. I want Fala7.
I want to lead people to Fala7 as well. Only true and correct way to do so being Islam.
I want to work my ass off without burning out and loosing willingness to hammer myself down. I want that life. I want good clothes no more homeless drip, I want a good haircut. I want 60 Kg bench and then 70. I want good lifts. I want freedom. Did I mention freedom?
I want to prove to everyone as well I am not just a weird outlier, I am a successful outlier. I want to regain all the respect I lost from promises that took too long to be fulfilled. I don't want to sound crazy anymore.
I want to drive fast. I want speed and acceleration and air hitting my hair kind of freedom. I want comfort and luxury. Modest one of course. I want the ability to help my loved ones when they need. I want to be that person they call when shit hits the fan and I want to be respected for that. 
I want to help and be the backbone of everyone.
I've always been my own backbone alhamdulillah. But it's all for the sake of reaching the other path.
I want to have a setup, a clean one, professional one. I want an office. Cool and compact one. I want huge screens. I want money. I want to be so valuable that I become irreplaceable. I want to become so lockedin people get confused.
I want to not talk in the work session unless it's important. I want to be so insane.
I want to work 10 hours a day. everyday stating from 3 am.

I want all that.

I am going to call the previous sets of livestreams.
I want to document it all and be the inspiration. I want to actually master productivety as it feels it's this dance between taking care of myself and loving it on one hand and mastering that. And then mastering pushing it. And each side of those two separate equations become a "lubricant" for the other. Could've found a better word there. You could tell where my head is at there. Anyways.

I want a car and a great ass laptop. And I want the means to buying a new laptop every month.
I am turning 21 in 14 days. Very sad in deed.
A lot to learn.
But let's set some insane goal.

the 21 challenge. reaching 22 hundred dollars a month? the 10k mark?
Reach 22 hundred by 22 is insane feat. **If I achieved it.**

What about 22 mlayin twansa? that's precisely $6000/month. 
What are we thinking? that's just 3000 paid subscribers. In a year... Should be extremely manageable. 

I think that's it. that's the goal. 
Can I get 220 in kgs total lift? bench, pulldown and squat that would be insane.
I think it's only fitting if I do 11 hours of work
1 hour of gym
and 11 hours of sleep. so like 9 and 2. 
that's 23 hours how the fuck will I go to the internship??? fuck.

3 - 8. 5 hoours. then 2 hours in the lunch break. then 4 hours at home after the gym.

11 hours a day. to reach 22 mlayin twansa.
I will be honest. I don't see a reason why not reach that bitch. all documented.

in 2 months I should add one k. that's it. just one k. 500 paid subscribers. 250 every month. less than one a day. with 11 hours of work to ensure ONE fucking paid subscribers is added to the list. I mean come fucking on?

like what are we doing here?

Like WTF? 

that's 0.83 paid subscriber a day.
that's 0.07 an hour. 
if the goal is 10 hours. that's 0.083 paid subscriber an hour. like?

How much of  failure can I be to not do that??

Can we also reach 2 thousand free subscriber to my Skool? teaching them everything? the ultimate Muslim Skool that spreads Islam?
Like can we do that?

no let's not set goals unto that.

All I am going to do is walk by half an hour every day and see what happens. 

How bad do I want it? 
![{011BF9FA-A30E-4609-8A1C-0F4A9817F731}.png](data:image/png;base64,)
That's the fucking question.
I have an entire 13 hours for anything else. almost 7 non sleep hours for everything else. like? Can we fucking manage that for god sake?

Am I willing to sacrifice almost half a day every day to reach 22 mlaying twansa? 
Answer: Yes. Yes I am.

That means wake up at 3 even when tired and hit an insane leg day yesterday.
That means plateuing in the Gym.
That means getting a bit fatter no matter how less you eat.
That mean back pain. 

But really looking at the current state of existance. I don't think I have anything to loose alhamdulillah. 
Twakkal on Allah EVERY single second to aide me through this is a necessity.

That being said. that's all.
